name: heyhomex-load-testing
description: HeyHomex load testing project using k6 and TypeScript

scripts.build: npm run build:buyer && npm run build:register-users
scripts.test:search-50-users-2m: npm run build:buyer && node scripts/run-buyer-test.js search-50-users-2m 50 2m
scripts.test:search-75-users-2m: npm run build:buyer && node scripts/run-buyer-test.js search-75-users-2m 75 2m
scripts.test:search-100-users-2m: npm run build:buyer && node scripts/run-buyer-test.js search-100-users-2m 100 2m
scripts.test:search-200-users-1m: npm run build:buyer && node scripts/run-buyer-test.js search-200-users-1m 200 1m
scripts.test:search-300-users-1m: npm run build:buyer && node scripts/run-buyer-test.js search-300-users-1m 300 1m
scripts.test:search-500-users-1m: npm run build:buyer && node scripts/run-buyer-test.js search-500-users-1m 500 1m
scripts.test:search-750-users-1m: npm run build:buyer && node scripts/run-buyer-test.js search-750-users-1m 750 1m
scripts.test:search-1000-users-1m: npm run build:buyer && node scripts/run-buyer-test.js search-1000-users-1m 1000 1m
scripts.test:register-users: npm run build:register-users && k6 run dist/register-users-from-csv.js
